headline: 2 Reasons to Watch VRTX and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals’s 22.2% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 19.8%, and its stock price has climbed to $480.31 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
